question text: Match the following terms to the correct example:

answers.text: The change in shape or size of an object due to an applied force.
A mixture of two or more elements, where at least one is a metal, to enhance properties.
The temperature at which a solid turns into a liquid.
Having the property of attracting iron or certain other materials.
The ability of a material to be hammered or rolled into thin sheets.
The way a material reflects light, typically associated with a shiny appearance.
The ability of a material to be stretched into a wire without breaking.
An element that is typically shiny, ductile, malleable, and a good conductor of heat and electricity.
A material that resists the flow of heat or electricity.
A material that allows the flow of heat or electricity.
A negatively charged subatomic particle found in atoms.
The process by which heat or electricity is directly transmitted through a material.
An element that is typically dull, brittle, and a poor conductor of heat and electricity.
A property of a material that breaks easily without significant deformation.
